query:
INSERT INTO statutes (jurisdiction, code, section, title, text_content, tags) VALUES
('CA', 'CC', '1942.4', 'Tenant Habitability',
 'A landlord of a dwelling may not demand rent, collect rent, issue a notice of a rent increase, or issue a three-day notice to pay rent or quit, if the dwelling substantially lacks any of the following affirmative standard characteristics: Effective waterproofing and weather protection of roof and exterior walls, plumbing or gas facilities, a water supply, heating facilities, electrical lighting, building and grounds maintained free from debris, filth, rubbish, garbage, rodents, and vermin.',
 'tenant_rights,habitability,landlord_tenant'),
('CA', 'CC', '1946.2', 'Just Cause Eviction',
 'After a tenant has continuously and lawfully occupied a residential real property for 12 months, the owner of the residential real property shall not terminate the tenancy without just cause, which shall be stated in the written notice to terminate tenancy.',
 'tenant_rights,eviction,just_cause'),
('CA', 'CC', '1947.12', 'Rent Cap (AB 1482)',
 'An owner of residential real property shall not, over the course of any 12-month period, increase the gross rental rate for a dwelling or unit more than the lesser of the following: 5 percent plus the percentage change in the cost of living, or 10 percent.',
 'tenant_rights,rent_control,ab1482'),
('CA', 'CC', '1950.5', 'Security Deposit Limits',
 'A landlord may not demand or receive security for a rental agreement for residential property in an amount or value in excess of an amount equal to two months'' rent, in the case of unfurnished residential property, and an amount equal to three months'' rent, in the case of furnished residential property.',
 'tenant_rights,security_deposit,landlord_tenant'),
('CA', 'CC', '1950.7', 'Security Deposit Return',
 'Within 21 calendar days after the tenant has vacated the premises, the landlord shall furnish the tenant, by personal delivery or by first-class mail, postage prepaid, a copy of an itemized statement indicating the basis for, and the amount of, any security received and the disposition of the security.',
 'tenant_rights,security_deposit,return'),
('CA', 'CC', '1942', 'Repair and Deduct Remedy',
 'If within a reasonable time after written or oral notice to the landlord or the landlord''s agent of dilapidations rendering the premises untenantable which the landlord ought to repair, the landlord neglects to do so, the tenant may repair the same himself where the cost of such repairs does not require an expenditure more than one month''s rent.',
 'tenant_rights,repairs,remedy'),
('CA', 'CC', '1942.5', 'Retaliatory Eviction Prohibition',
 'If the lessor retaliates against the lessee because of the exercise by the lessee of his or her rights under this chapter or because of his or her complaint to an appropriate agency as to tenantability of a dwelling, and if the lessee of a dwelling is not in default as to the payment of his or her rent, the lessor may not recover possession of a dwelling in any action or proceeding.',
 'tenant_rights,retaliation,eviction'),
('CA', 'CC', '1954', 'Landlord Entry Requirements',
 'A landlord may enter the dwelling unit only in the following cases: In case of emergency. To make necessary or agreed repairs, decorations, alterations or improvements. To exhibit the dwelling unit to prospective or actual purchasers, mortgagees, tenants, workers, or contractors. When the tenant has abandoned or surrendered the premises.',
 'tenant_rights,privacy,entry'),
('CA', 'CCP', '1161', 'Unlawful Detainer - 3-Day Notice',
 'A tenant of real property, for a term less than life, or the executor or administrator of his or her estate heretofore qualified and now acting or hereafter to be qualified and act, is guilty of unlawful detainer when the tenant continues in possession after default in the payment of rent.',
 'tenant_rights,eviction,unlawful_detainer'),
('CA', 'CCP', '1161.2', 'Unlawful Detainer - Court Records',
 'The clerk may not allow access to the court file in an action for unlawful detainer except to a party to the action, including a party''s attorney, until 60 days after the complaint has been filed.',
 'tenant_rights,eviction,court_records'),
('CA', 'CC', '789.3', 'Lockout Prohibition',
 'A landlord shall not with intent to terminate the occupancy under any lease or other tenancy or estate at will, however created, of property used by a tenant as his or her residence willfully cause, directly or indirectly, the interruption or termination of any utility service furnished the tenant.',
 'tenant_rights,lockout,self_help'),
('CA', 'CC', '1946.1', 'Notice to Terminate Tenancy',
 'A hiring of residential real property for an unspecified term may be terminated by either party by giving written notice to the other at least 30 days before the termination date. If the tenant has resided in the dwelling for one year or more, the landlord shall give the tenant at least 60 days'' written notice.',
 'tenant_rights,notice,termination');
